title: aira aquatica var. distans
intro: Aira aquatica var. distans, also known as slender hair grass or distant hair grass, is a plant species in the genus Aira, characterized by its slender stems and panicles of spikelets. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Aira aquatica var. distans include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Aira aquatica var. distans can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
